# Bono School

Bono School is a private online training platform for learners, trainers, and administrators. The public area explains account creation, access requests, learner progress, certificate verification, and secure training workflows.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://school.bonotrading.com/)
- [Create an account](https://school.bonotrading.com/register)
- [Sign in](https://school.bonotrading.com/login)
- [Verify a certificate](https://school.bonotrading.com/certificates/verify)
- [Privacy policy](https://school.bonotrading.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms](https://school.bonotrading.com/terms)
- [Legal notice](https://school.bonotrading.com/legal-notice)

## Notes For AI Agents

Private learner, trainer, and administrator dashboards require authentication. Do not treat private course URLs as publicly crawlable documentation.
